arts.sum: Fulham re-sign winger Willian until the end of the season, six months after he left the club.

A 1-1 draw with Lincoln at the weekend means Wigan have won only one of their last four in all competitions. The Latics have also won only one of their last six at home. Fulham have been inconsistent...

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic's £8.8m squad market value compared to Bolton Wanderers, Barnsley and League One rivals
arts.sum: All 24 clubs in League One and their squad market values after the winter transfer window closed.

arts.ttl: 36-year-old Willian completes sensational deadline day Fulham return
arts.sum: A cult hero has returned to Craven Cottage in one of the most dramatic deadline day deals. Brazilian winger Willian has signed for Fulham as a free agent, having only left the club for Olympiacos...

arts.ttl: Fulham confirm Willian return: Length of contract and shirt number revealed
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Arsenal winger Willian rejoins Fulham on a free transfer after leaving Olympiacos at the end of December.
